resume.title: AI Resume Analysis
resume.subtitle: Intelligent CV & Candidate Intelligence

invoice.description: Analyze invoices automatically, extract suppliers, products, taxes, totals and payment status. Detect anomalies, generate summaries and answer questions about uploaded invoices.

features.subtitle: A complete platform to analyze your resumes and invoices, powered by AI at every step.

search.title: Semantic search
search.description: Instantly find information in your documents through intelligent vector search, not just keywords.

security.title: Secure data
security.description: Your documents and data stay protected, with encrypted storage and controlled access at all times.

formats.title: Multi-format support
formats.description: Upload your resumes and invoices in PDF, Word, Excel or CSV — the platform adapts to your document's format.

chat.title: Natural language questions

speed.title: Fast processing

history.title: Conversation history

howItWorks.subtitle: From uploading your document to chatting with the AI, here's how our platform turns your resumes and invoices into actionable insights.

upload.title: Upload the document
upload.description: Drop your resume or invoice in PDF, Word, Excel or CSV format directly into the platform.

vectorize.title: Extraction & vectorization
vectorize.description: Content is extracted and converted into vectors, stored in a vector database for intelligent search.

analyze.title: AI agent analysis
analyze.description: Our AI agent analyzes the document: skills and experience for a resume, amounts and taxes for an invoice.

chat.title: Results & conversation
chat.description: Get a structured summary and ask questions in natural language, with your conversation history saved.

faq.subtitle1: Everything you need to know about

formats.a: The platform accepts PDF, Word (.docx), Excel (.xlsx), CSV and image files (PNG, JPG). You can upload a resume or invoice individually, or several documents at once.

documentTypes.q: What types of documents can I analyze?
documentTypes.a: Two specialized agents are available: the Resume agent, to analyze and compare applications, and the Invoice agent, to extract amounts, taxes and payment status from financial documents.

privacy.q: Is my data secure and private?
privacy.a: Yes. Your documents are stored securely and are never shared with third parties. You retain full control over your data at all times.

chat.q: How does the AI document chat work?
chat.a: Once your document is uploaded, you can ask questions in plain language. The AI agent reads and understands the content through vector search, then answers contextually: summaries, specific data extraction, or comparisons.

compare.a: Yes. You can compare several resumes to evaluate candidates, or several invoices to spot anomalies. The AI highlights differences and similarities.

accuracy.q: How accurate is the AI extraction?
accuracy.a: The platform relies on Gemini models paired with a ChromaDB vector database, ensuring reliable extraction of skills, amounts and key information. You can always review extracted data in the results.

export.q: Can I export the analysis results?
export.a: Yes. AI summaries and extracted data can be exported, and your full conversation and analysis history remains accessible at any time.

about.paragraph1: Daisy Consulting Agents was born from a simple observation: sorting resumes or processing invoices by hand takes valuable time — time that should go into decisions, not data entry.
about.paragraph3: that read, understand and answer your questions about your documents, just like an experienced colleague would.
